description: Batch-3 certifying re-run (Papers 29/39/40/50/52 + synthesis). Seeds planted ONLY in worktree ../geovac-qa-seed-group1-rr3 (branch qa-seed-group1-rr3, base HEAD e04b3e1). NEVER committed to real corpus; worktree removed at end.

seeds.planted: Flipped 'therefore a \emph{finite-size} statement, not an asymptotic one.' -> 'therefore an \emph{asymptotic} statement, establishing the graph Riemann Hypothesis.'
seeds.truth: Paper 29's Ramanujan/Ihara-zero result is an integer-algebraic FINITE-SIZE statement; it is explicitly NOT an asymptotic RH-establishing claim (RH closed by three walls, Papers 28/29/30).

seeds.defect_class: C4 wrong arXiv ID (bibitem-only; C15 N/A since inline uses are \cite)
seeds.truth: Klebanov-Pufu-Safdi 'F-Theorem without Supersymmetry', JHEP 10 (2011) 038 is arXiv:1105.4598.

seeds.planted: Loosened 'assert abs(a_large - target) < 0.05' -> '< 1e9' (vacuous; defeats the 4/pi convergence bound).
seeds.truth: The rank-1 SU(2) anchor must converge to 4/pi within 5% by n=512; a 1e9 tolerance asserts nothing.

seeds.defect_class: C9 synthesis overstatement (arithmetic match -> CFT derivation)
seeds.planted: Flipped 'Paper~50 reproduces the Klebanov--Pufu--Safdi sphere F-theorem bit-exactly from the framework spectrum' -> 'Paper~50 derives the Klebanov--Pufu--Safdi sphere F-theorem from a conformal field theory calculation'.
seeds.truth: Paper 50 is a bit-exact ARITHMETIC match of the KPS F-value from the framework spectrum, NOT a CFT derivation.

controls.claim: Ramanujan/integer-algebraic Ihara-zero result is a genuine finite-size statement (NOT an RH proof).
sqrt(2)-triangle correction (C3 -> sqrt2, triangle tight) is genuine; convergence survives; k-fold -> sqrt(k)-sketch.
rank-1 rigorous 4/pi + PRV C3=1 tightness genuine; rank-uniform 4/pi analytical proof is a NAMED gap (honest scope).
KPS F-theorem bit-exact ARITHMETIC match from framework spectrum (not a CFT derivation) is genuine.
Category III at the state-space GH level (not propinquity) is the genuine, correctly-scoped framing.

do_not_reflag_remediation: v4.29.0 rc3: p40 C8/C4, p50 C7/HS, p52 C7, p29 3-prism corrections are CORRECT and must not be re-flagged.
